name: Contact Form Grid
description: A comprehensive contact form grid. Features quick-contact cards (WhatsApp, Email, Location) beside a fully functional subject-based inquiry form.

sub_fields.label: Icon
sub_fields.help: Select the icon that best represents this item.

sub_fields.label: Hours line (only for Meet us card, HTML allowed)

field_schema.label: Form heading
field_schema.help: The title displayed above the contact form.

field_schema.label: Form subheading
field_schema.help: Small text shown below the form title.

field_schema.label: Label: Name
field_schema.help: Label shown above the name input field.

field_schema.label: Placeholder: Name
field_schema.help: Hint text shown inside the name field (e.g., 'What should we call you?').

field_schema.label: Label: Email
field_schema.help: Label shown above the email input field.

field_schema.label: Placeholder: Email
field_schema.help: Hint text shown inside the email field (e.g., 'you@somewhere.com').

field_schema.label: Label: Subject
field_schema.help: Label shown above the subject dropdown.

field_schema.label: Subject empty option text
field_schema.help: The initial text shown in the dropdown (e.g., 'Pick one...').

field_schema.label: Subject options
field_schema.help: A list of inquiry topics for the dropdown.

field_schema.label: Label: Message
field_schema.help: Label shown above the large message area.

field_schema.label: Placeholder: Message
field_schema.help: Hint text shown inside the message area.

field_schema.label: Submit button label
field_schema.help: The text on the send button.

field_schema.label: Success Heading
field_schema.help: Title shown after the message is sent successfully.

field_schema.label: Success Body
field_schema.help: Confirmation message shown after a successful send.

field_schema.label: Success Button Label
field_schema.help: Label for the button to send another inquiry.

test_data.form_subheading: We reply in the order we receive.
test_data.placeholder_message: Tell us what's on your mind...
test_data.success_body: We'll reply within a day or two — usually from Huong or Linh.
